src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Generated annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 17+ ecosystems.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed or deprecated in newer Jakarta EE versions; using it causes compilation errors or classpath conflicts when the project dependencies have shifted to jakarta.annotation.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation with jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.annotation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Fix invalid escape sequence in string literal to comply with stricter Java compiler rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Compile error: invalid escape sequence '\'' in string literal (Java 17 compiler is stricter about unrecognized escape sequences than older versions).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace the legacy Hibernate5 Jackson module with the Jakarta EE namespace variant to support the migration from javax to jakarta packages.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.datatype.hibernate5.Hibernate5Module is removed or incompatible in newer Jackson versions targeting Jakarta EE; using it causes a compile error (class not found) or runtime linkage error on JDK 17 with Jakarta dependencies.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated setLabels method with setLabelFilter to align with newer Spring Boot LiquibaseProperties API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method setLabels(String) was removed or deprecated in favor of setLabelFilter(String) in newer Spring Boot versions; calling the old method causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 5.7+ API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6.0; extending it causes compilation errors or severe deprecation warnings in modern Spring Boot 3.x environments.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.0 method security configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it results in a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Migrate HTTP security configuration from imperative configure(HttpSecurity) method to declarative lambda DSL in SecurityFilterChain bean.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method is part of the deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter; the new standard requires returning a SecurityFilterChain bean with lambda-based configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before:
@Override
public void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
@Bean
public SecurityFilterChain filterChain(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules to use the new Spring Security 6.0 API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6.0; using it causes a compilation error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated featurePolicy header configuration with permissionsPolicy in the headers DSL.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: featurePolicy is deprecated and removed in newer Spring Security versions; the API expects permissionsPolicy.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom JWT configuration adapter with standard OAuth2 Resource Server JWT configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom JWTConfigurer approach is incompatible with the new SecurityFilterChain structure and Spring Security 6.0's preferred OAuth2 resource server model.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace custom SecurityProblemSupport exception handling with standard BearerTokenAuthenticationEntryPoint and BearerTokenAccessDeniedHandler.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The custom problem support integration is removed in favor of standard OAuth2 exception handlers in the new security configuration.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove WebSecurity ignore configuration as it is no longer needed or handled differently in the new filter chain.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The configure(WebSecurity) method is part of the deprecated adapter; static resource ignoring is often handled by Spring Boot auto-configuration or explicit permitAll in the filter chain.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update imports to use new Spring Security 6.0 classes and remove deprecated ones.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Old imports like WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter and EnableGlobalMethodSecurity no longer exist or are deprecated, causing compilation failures.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile without jakarta.servlet imports.
